---
title: Nathalia<br> Thompson
#<!--cover-img: /assets/img/people/nathaliathompson.jpg-->
role: DiMeN PhD Student
alumni_name: "Nathalia Thompson"
categories:
  - PhD student
  - current
rank: 2
page-layout: article
image: ../../assets/img/people/nathaliathompson_v2.png
toc: false
email: qwv508@york.ac.uk
orcid:
labdate: "September 2023 - date"
---

### Email address: 

qwv508@york.ac.uk

### Post: 

DiMeN DTP PhD student

### Start date: 

September 2023
